name: place_cover
description: Place oak_planks toward threat direction to create cover and reduce damage
parameters: z.object({ maxBlocks: z.number().int().min(1).max(10).default(2).describe("Maximum number of blocks to place for cover."), targetHostileId: z.union([z.number(), z.string()]).optional().describe("Specific hostile entity ID to hide from. If omitted, the nearest hostile is used."), preferredBlockName: z.string().default("oak_planks").describe("The block type to use for cover.") })
